claims.summary: Recess can contain active high-entropy synthesis rather than inactivity.
claims.disposition: Verified recess_activity_load_v1 distinguishes active synthesis from structural stabilization without spending budget or changing priority.

claims.summary: Recess pressure, porosity, and density should remain visible as possible sedimentary work.
claims.disposition: Verified density-aware Recess and spectral-pruning evidence with explicit no-control markers.

claims.summary: Entropy, Recess mode, and pressure should be compared across observed windows.
claims.disposition: Routed a bounded read-only correlation using existing Recess and pressure profiles.

claims.summary: A sediment-decay mechanism could relieve accumulated Recess pressure.
claims.disposition: Preserved as Tier 5 because decay changes Minime runtime state and regulation.
